title: Excalibur | Burnt Basic Support
description: This resource pack redraws the Burnt Basic mod in the Excalibur style
body:
This unofficial compatibility pack ensures that the textures in the [Burnt Basic](https://modrinth.com/mod/burnt-basic) Mod seamlessly integrate with the amazing [Excalibur](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/excal) resource pack.

This pack is currently incomplete and still WIP. For now, I'm not going to do the full Burnt support, just the Basic version.

**Credits:**
- Maffhew – Creator of Excalibur
- Pxlbnk - Creator of Burnt Basic
